text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Just a little longer now... Hehe, waiting for the curtain to rise is so
exciting, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Earlier that day...

Thank you for seeing me off. I'll be sure to call you when I'm on my
way home.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer, good day to you. I didn't expect to see you here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm headed to the theater. One of our family's sponsors sent us a
couple of tickets for a play.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My sister was supposed to join me, but she unfortunately has a race
today, so I'm going alon—ah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I understand that this is very sudden, but would you like to join me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad we could see this play together, Trainer. It's a very
popular piece—one that I've been meaning to see for some time now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's the story of two knights who decide to seek fame and fortune by
expelling a ghost from a haunted castle. It's a comedy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've heard it's based on a classic, but according to reviews, it has its
own merits as a piece of contemporary—oh, it's starting.

text_block_list.name: Knight A
text_block_list.text:
My friend, do my eyes deceive me? Is that not the accursed castle,
said to only appear at dusk? What a foreboding atmosphere...

text_block_list.name: Knight B
text_block_list.text:
Do not let the tales of ghosts and ghouls frighten you, comrade! O
Lady Luck, grant us your boon on this hunt, so that we may at last
obtain glory!

text_block_list.name: Knights
text_block_list.text: A g-g-g-g-ghost?! Oh, it was just you... Hey, quit copying me! Arrrghh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh dear! Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to the play's reputation, the theater periodically fills with
laughter. But the most memorable part of the play for me is watching
Ardan's reactions.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It seems the reviews were spot-on. It certainly was entertaining to
watch those two jump at every single sound, wasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
However... I am a little sad a ghost never actually appeared. If it were
me, I would return to that castle every night until I finally saw one.
choice_data_list: You want to meet the ghost that badly?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't teatime with a ghost sound delightful? I'm sure they'd have
plenty of stories about the castle's history...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And... Allowing someone forgotten to shine again for just a moment
feels like a resurrection of sorts, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What a pleasant breeze.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, would you like to take a walk with me? The sunset is so
beautiful, after all. It almost feels like—
choice_data_list: Like we'll stumble upon that castle?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... wouldn't that be a splendid surprise.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As a child, I would often imagine myself as one of the characters in
the play I had just seen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I could be anything—a young man or even an old woman. Sometimes
I'd go on an adventure, while other times I'd do something bad and
get scolded for it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
We only live once, but through the power of imagination, I felt like I
was able to step into the life of another for a brief moment. It was like
a secret game.
choice_data_list:
So are you imagining yourself as a knight right
now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm not so sure about that. Perhaps I'm a curious ghost, simply
observing the two bumbling intruders who claim to be there to hunt
me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Good point... If the knights had actually found the ghost, would it
have wanted to talk to them?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
If it were me, I'd certainly want to know what sort of people the
knights were.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: For example, what sort of games did they play as children?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh dear! Hehe, you must have been quite the adorable child, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'd love to hear more. Tell me, what else did you play as a child?
choice_data_list: Well, at this time of year...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ah...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: P-pardon me. Goodness... My stomach doesn't usually growl like that.
choice_data_list:
We've been walking for a while, so it makes
sense.

We've been walking for a while, so it makes
sense.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh really? I hadn't noticed. Your stories were just so interesting.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
We certainly have walked a lot though... I usually avoid taking such
long walks. Otherwise people worry about my health.
choice_data_list:
Well, that's in the past. You can handle it now,
right?

Well, that's in the past. You can handle it now,
right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
In addition, I was wondering... Perhaps we could use today's
increased practice regimen going forward?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I was just about to ask.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Ehehe, I should be grateful. As I am now, I don't have to worry
about overheating anymore.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (That's right. Trainer always believes in my abilities...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (How strange... My chest feels so warm... Trainer is so...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ah... No, I'm fine. I was just reflecting on how much fun I've had
today.
choice_data_list: All that fun must've worked up your appetite.
All that fun must've worked up your appetite.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, please stop teasing me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But yes... Today certainly was filled with excitement. I believe I
learned something new about myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that... is a secret.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
In any case, the sun will soon set. We should both head home before
we run into an actual ghost.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you again for accepting my sudden invitation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she doesn't give in to my teasing, I notice that I feel closer to
Mejiro Ardan now than at the beginning of the day.
